description: Clean title block from a construction drawing — canonical OCR robustness benchmark

date.note: ISO-like date from title block; stable across all 3 variants

foglio.note: sheet identifier; stable in original and high_contrast, near-stable in rotated

scale.note: SCALE: 1:2 corrupted to 'de:' / '1 dor)' — small text lost under downsampling

revision.note: REV cell not extracted by any variant

massa.note: MASSA: field disappears under downsampling in rotated variant

finitura.note: FINITURA SUP: field disappears under downsampling in rotated variant

lavorazioni.note: salmon-background header: low contrast survives Otsu but text not detected

notes: convergence=6666 is NOT a failure. It is the first real perception entropy measurement — partial semantic convergence under 3 genuinely different perceptual transforms. This is the canonical floor for this fixture.
